prompt: Tap river slot to complete out-of-position range defense line.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before range action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. River card anchored to complete the out-of-position defense line.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The river card is the right anchor because the final board state decides whether the out-of-position range can keep defending or must give up.
